description: Declares every hook script and whether it must be registered in settings.json. Used by session-preflight.sh to detect missing or extra registrations. scope: global = registered in ~/.claude/settings.json; scope: project = registered in .claude/settings.local.json via sweetclaude:on. command_path: the ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}-rooted path used when registering this hook in settings.json.

hooks.purpose: Loads session state, validates hook registrations, generates session-state.yaml
Detects artifact-format drift at session start; writes pending-drift-decision.yaml and emits AskUserQuestion instruction if drift found
Blocks sweetclaude:* skill invocations until bootstrap has run this session and any pending drift decision is resolved
Blocks tool calls when SweetClaude is disabled or phase.yaml is missing
Prevents edits to test files during TDD implementation phase
Warns when writing implementation code before tests exist
Blocks writes to artifact paths that bypass the sc-artifact adapter
Blocks IMPLEMENT entry in Kanban mode when WIP limit is reached
Runs the test suite after every source file edit during TDD IMPLEMENT phase
Regenerates session-state.yaml when phase.yaml or skills.yaml changes
Records the active plan file path and sprint/milestone context to .sweetclaude/state/active-plan.txt when plan mode exits
Reminds the user of a pending migration Accept/Rollback decision; hard-blocks at turn 10. Silent when no marker file is present.
Utility called explicitly by skills (e.g. code-tdd) to commit a git checkpoint. NOT an event hook — takes a $MESSAGE argument.
Protocol guardian only — registered by guardian-on skill, not in baseline hooks.json. Blocks phase-advancing language.
RAG corpus indexing — registered only when document-corpus skill is active. Not a baseline hook.
Called by session-preflight.sh to produce session-state.yaml. Not a standalone event hook.
Shell library (source'd by skills). Not an event hook.
